title: Printing Dashboard formatting
excerpt:
Hey everyone! 
I have a pretty extensive dashboard made for our sales division. I understand I can send people the link right to the board, but when I go to print it the formatting is all messed up and it looks terrible. …

posts.author: danielle0127 (danielle hernandez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone!

I have a pretty extensive dashboard made for our sales division. I understand I can send people the link right to the board, but when I go to print it the formatting is all messed up and it looks terrible.

Has anyone found a way to fix this? Make it look better or such?

Thanks!

posts.author: bswersey (Bill)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree, I just tried to print (save as PDF actually) a dashboard calendar which is nicely color-coded and the print out looked awful. Same in browser and desktop app (Mac). Why even offer printing at all if it looks so bad?
